title: AGU's Crazy Creations
description: This mod adds many random features that I feel like adding or was asked to add.
body:
Some features:

Mystbloom Tiara - A flower tiara granting the user water, permanent breathing, and luck

Fubuzilla Plushie - Based on a plushie made by Hololive Corp for their talent, Shirakami Fubuki

Bleeding Obsidian - Created by hitting a mob over a block of crying obsidian

Ultrasword - Based on a drawing of mine from 4th grade lol, just a good sword

Pocket Nuke - Is what the name implies, causes a fun amount of destruction :)

Cyberpink Armor - Adds cyberpunk-style pink armor to the game 

Reaver Scythe - A deep red netherite scythe with high damage and low atk spd

 

PLEASE REQUEST IN THE COMMENTS!! I'D LOVE TO GET SOME MORE IDEAS!!!
